title: Sahak Gangster
overview: Sahak was raised by Pak Andak, a notorious local gangster who saw him as the future leader of the Bunga Merah Gang. Everything changed when Pak Andak was arrested while attempting to rescue his niece Maya from their traditional rival, the Pak Man Gang. After serving five years in prison, Pak Andak was released. On the very day of his release, he was ambushed and fatally shot, dying in Sahak`s arms. With his last breath, Pak Andak charged Sahak with a critical mission: to uncover and avenge his murderer. Sahak becomes a wanted man, disappearing from the murder scene and becoming the primary suspect in Pak Andak`s killing. Sahak is determined to honour Pak Andak`s final request and seek revenge.
